issues.explanation: The paragraph cites C003 for Q2 2025 revenue, but C003 is not in the cited chunk refs list (only C005 is cited). Furthermore, C005 contains Operating Income data ($612,000,000), not Revenue data. The revenue figures are actually supported by K001 calculation results, not by any income statement chunk.
issues.recommended_fix: Remove the C003 citation for revenue figures. Revenue data should be attributed to K001 calculation results only, or cite the correct revenue chunk if available. Alternatively, update the cited chunk refs to include the actual revenue source chunk.
